full_text:
Gao Xiang 高翔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Xiang (高翔). Officer of Shu. Participated in many of Zhuge Liang’s northern campaigns. Gao Xiang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Gao Xiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
